events.label: Agent note
events.message: I’ll begin by observing the first-person view, then navigate to the floor switch while keeping clear of the warning-marked broken paving.

events.label: Agent note
events.message: The hazard is now visible along the left side, with the low yellow switch at its near corner. I’m approaching that corner from the surrounding green floor so the warning-marked paving stays outside the path.

events.label: Agent note
events.message: That attempt failed because the jump carried the character over the hazard boundary; the delayed landing triggered the forbidden zone. I’m resetting and using a ground-only approach from the switch’s green-floor side.
